chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.653 of 2021 ______________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.2716/21 2. For orders on office objection No.4 3. For orders on Misc. No.2717/21 4. For orders on Misc. No.2718/21 5. For hearing of main case. Dated: 28.01.2021 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo for petitioner. -.-.- Urgency granted. The subject matter of this petition is a transfer of an officer of the Irrigation Department who is attempting to comply with the orders of Division Bench of this Court at Sukkur Bench in certain petitions whereby an extensive drive against encroachers was ordered. In view of such compliance the officers concerned, either of the irrigation department of forest department, were given task to remove the encroachments and trespassers from the land of irrigation and forest departments. Petitioner claims to be actively complying with the orders, which actions are not appreciated by the high officials, as alleged. Consequently it is claimed that the high ups have lodged complaints against the petitioner and as a consequence whereof impugned transfer order was issued which would curtail the actions and drive against the encroachers and trespassers. Learned counsel submits that this is perhaps an action purely on malafide and is not based on actual requirements of transfer. The petitions which were pending before the Sukkur Bench are now pending before the Larger Bench of this Court at principal seat and the issues in this petition are somehow linked with the issue arising out of earlier petitions filed before Sukkur Bench and now pending before the larger Bench at principal seat with new number as D-6550 of 2020.

Learned counsel submits that this is perhaps an action purely on malafide and is not based on actual requirements of transfer. The petitions which were pending before the Sukkur Bench are now pending before the Larger Bench of this Court at principal seat and the issues in this petition are somehow linked with the issue arising out of earlier petitions filed before Sukkur Bench and now pending before the larger Bench at principal seat with new number as D-6550 of 2020. When inquired from the learned counsel that somehow issues in this petition are linked with the compliance of order of Sukkur Bench, he may file petition before the same Bench or an application before the concerned Bench at Sukkur, he submits that since now the matter is being proceeded at principal seat this petition may also be tagged along with said bunch pending before larger Bench. In view of above this matter be placed before Hon’ble Chief Justice to either to fix it along referred cases before larger Bench or any other order as deem fit and proper in the facts and circumstances of the case. Judge Judge
